input:
Title: Add pagination support to /entities endpoint
Author: Priya Sharma
Assignee: Priya Sharma
Labels: enhancement, api
Milestone: v1.0.0

Body:
Currently the /entities endpoint returns all entities at once. With large workspaces this causes timeouts (>30s observed by customer Globex Corp). We need cursor-based pagination, max 200 per page.

Acceptance criteria:
- cursor param accepted on GET /entities
- Response includes next_cursor and has_more
- Default limit: 50, max: 200
